emails.subject: pricing
emails.body: pricing Jon, Good talking with you this morning. I have a few clients that would like to contract at the 5.00 level. Could you price 123 year contracts out of September 01 for me. Thanks Gregory Frers Enron Direct Sales Manager Suite 950, Encor Place 645 7th. Avenue SW Calgary, Alberta T2P 4G8 Ph. 403-663-2805 Fax 403-663-2899 Greg.Frers@enron.com <mailto:Greg.Frers@enron.com>

emails.subject: RE: pricing
emails.body: RE: pricing Soccerdome Telus 1 year 4.43 4.46 2 year 4.58 4.60 3 year 4.62 4.635 Sorry it took so long. Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: Pricing
emails.body: Pricing Good morning Jon, I need some firm pricing for the Telus Convention Centre, Lindsay Park and for Hillsboro Enterprises. one -Two three year contracts. Hillsboro and Telus out of Oct. 1 and Lindsay out of Aug 1 one year contract. Telus should close today( if all goes well If you don't get back to me before 8:15AM could you email the prices to Mark Dickin. I'm off to Edmonton for a game leaving at 9:00AM. Thanks Jon. Greg Gregory Frers Enron Direct Sales Manager Suite 950, Encor Place 645 7th. Avenue SW Calgary, Alberta T2P 4G8 Ph. 403-663-2805 Fax 403-663-2899 Greg.Frers@enron.com <mailto:Greg.Frers@enron.com>

emails.subject: RE: Pricing
emails.body: RE: Pricing Telus Lindsay Park Hillsboro 1 Year 4.445 4.445 4.41 2 Year 4.545 4.545 4.50 3 Year 4.555 4.55 4.51 Good Luck......G0 STAMPS GO Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: Pricing
emails.body: Pricing Jon, Lindsay Park is being a pain in the butt could you update me on price. I know we are up today when do you think prices may get back down to 4.25 range again? Start Date August 1 Thanks Gregory Frers Enron Direct Sales Manager Suite 950, Encor Place 645 7th. Avenue SW Calgary, Alberta T2P 4G8 Ph. 403-663-2805 Fax 403-663-2899 Greg.Frers@enron.com <mailto:Greg.Frers@enron.com>

emails.subject: RE: Pricing
emails.body: RE: Pricing We would be offered at 4.43 right now, but like all things.... what goes up must come down. We moved down .16 in the front part of the curve, but the back has not followed as quickly. I would expect we will have a good hedging opportunity the next couple of days, and then rally after that. Regards, Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: RE: Pricing
emails.body: Jon, I'm not going to be in tomorrow and Kate Joslyn is going to close the Lindsay Park deal for me. Could you Email pricing to her directly instead of to me. Thanks Jon. Hey, if you ever need some tickets to go to a game let me know. Greg To: Frers, Greg

emails.subject: pricing
